query:
-- Check total service_billing_assignments now
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_assignments FROM service_billing_assignments;

-- Check services with revenue by provider
SELECT 
  s.billingPlatform,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.externalId) as services_with_revenue,
  SUM(s.monthlyRevenue) as total_revenue
FROM services s
WHERE s.monthlyRevenue > 0
  AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated', 'flagged_for_termination')
GROUP BY s.billingPlatform
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

-- Check total service_billing_assignments now
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_assignments FROM service_billing_assignments;

-- Check services with revenue by provider
SELECT 
  s.billingPlatform,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.externalId) as services_with_revenue,
  SUM(s.monthlyRevenue) as total_revenue
FROM services s
WHERE s.monthlyRevenue > 0
  AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated', 'flagged_for_termination')
GROUP BY s.billingPlatform
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;
